textByHash.8fe0b5a0cd5df530d6876a8fe9d47776adbbdc63: Before I assign you anything, I want to make something clear. My tasks have to be done in the Wilderness. Only kills inside the Wilderness will count.
textByHash.a154a090f570f96ebd2ad9b556e069e0e898ed9b: I don't check combat levels when choosing tasks, either. So even if other masters won't assign you 'tough' monsters, I'll pick anything for which you have the Slayer level, provided you can physically get to it.
textByHash.f953b6d81e609c67e93f55fb34f6b1c4183012ac: If you don't like my tasks, go and see Aya in Burthorpe, and ask her to assign you something else. She won't argue.
textByHash.e348620253341bbec4d78dfe224aeab64736117c: You might get a few unusual loot drops while you're on my assignments, if you're lucky. So, do you want me to assign you something?
textByHash.42e522a9c8d2ea20b6a29607e6cb4813f551c7a5: Your new task is to kill .
textByHash.27dcaf050f406e959dd0ad386d4ca7012303947f: You've got to do the task in the Wilderness.
textByHash.f3aa839fa0cd64749527916f22edb1e796c115ea: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.
textByHash.76ab7e85d50ee96ea81e9adef8a05916f8984233: You're still meant to be slaying in the Wilderness; you have to go. Come back when you've finished your task.
textByHash.bcbb8498291593d54d17bc467aa2cecdef849ba7: You're still hunting ; you have to go. Come back when you've finished your task.
textByHash.e81f713b73d0c12d2f9cefbb81e6b44f1367b13d: You're still hunting , with to go.
textByHash.2d898591aa17e44eb9f3da32c2911ab6fe5031e0: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHash.4690813fc8fa29e4a7a15380409b6987d0454188: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.
textByHash.3936915ec951a366ea891abbd6196e29203cad0a: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.
textByHash.b82b23c95a209f48e594407a6c089f1f0201bf7c: All the Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHash.b42c0ba3a1b3172734b1a85df15e8ae0aa1f044a: Other Slayer Masters take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so they won't set you anything too hard. But I don't do that - if you get a task from me, it could be anything for which you
textByHash.c89ce77e74de2ac77e6adcceb0ffa86d8e28badd: have the Slayer level, provided you can physically get to it.
textByHash.5c93e1f12d51a1f2a4a0d4c994a4bb9eeae7cf9b: Quite a lot! Those stupid guards think they've trapped me here for causing trouble, but I can get back out to the Wilderness for some fun anytime I like.
textByHash.f320cf58ea518d29dbb43f096eff177b63e9ee83: Well, normally, I can fix it so that you respawn in Edgeville whenever you die. However, I don't seem to be able to do so right now...
textByHash.dbbb36a19e85fc95ca6804bcb4bb4aae2887cb72: Hey, perhaps you'd like me to fix it so that you respawn in Edgeville whenever you die. If you love the Wilderness as much as I do, you might enjoy that.
textByHash.52ca8eea58e328552a0918be5b149ff578f355f0: Alright, here's the deal: Whenever you drop dead, I'll try to make you reappear in Edgeville, down by the southern ruins. You'll lose your items as normal.
textByHash.392d808ccfb3ecdcafd7886a45f6fc715ee6e4eb: My magic won't affect you if you die in some fancy place like Castle Wars or the Emir's Arena; those places have their own magic trying to make you 'safe'.
textByHash.46a0d7aa938e2c1fe78d7d7a613a63eda4b0dd69: This will apply on members' worlds and non-members' worlds alike.
textByHash.28fbcaf3865031f9dc0113302e386b2f9b6b7bab: I'll want a one-off payment of 5 million coins. If you get your respawn changed later, and then need me to set it back to Edgeville, I won't bill you again.
textByHash.4ed601f6dca17ed425e2458965f0331021372e00: Maybe you just can't handle Edgeville!
textByHash.f4d76b92fc1e55131b8722609c705e556e56cb1b: So do you want to respawn in Edgeville in future?
textByHash.26fd3becb42954d37a81c7843e06ebc17ba6fd23: Couldn't handle Ferox Enclave? Do you really think you could handle Edgeville?
textByHash.72194300c7cd85299a8485410529b0ddd6014cd9: Sounds like you're looking for some fun! Are you sure you can handle it?
textByHash.dd90af2a62dedb7cc8b959a30ca1877c0fce0012: So how's that Edgeville respawn working for you?
textByHash.d5759e8e49d7ef51dc893612b93abedf736eefa1: You really want to respawn in that dead-end slum? Are you sure? Come and see me if you want to respawn in Edgeville again; I won't ask for more money.
textByHash.dda587c980ccbd1e847edf610cd3c35076a8b2c4: Thank you. I actually made it myself!
textByHash.3db9340467fc11d5c3c28f37ded1442d51ab7118: Oh yes, I put the craft in witchcraft! I have plenty of spare time outside of assigning tasks so I've been making comics and stuffed toys.
textByHash.5084a7534b07cd77382abe79c9b4779393f50c52: Perhaps I have a little too much spare time! I've made so many things that I'm running out of room.
textByHash.028f871dca65410e4a647e54b4868566482b3e5d: I tried handing out stuffed chinchompas, but the guards mistook them for the real thing and arrested me for smuggling explosives out of my cell.
textByHash.53e62be1e6d86ce15d141c5fb804c974221ee74a: Well, I do make hats too.
textByHash.5bcec8e9ed26557d6f5513430380277f99178633: Bizarre, go on, what do you want then?
